depends_on.name: element_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the element this ontology label is associated with.

fields.name: term
fields.documentation: The ontology term labelling this element. The CURIE prefix identifies the source ontology (e.g., 'allen_ccf_v3'), the local part is the numeric ID (e.g., 'allen_ccf_v3:12345'), and 'name' carries the human-readable label.
